description:
Draw an elliptical ROI on the bright circular structure in the center of the loaded CT image. Record the Mean, StdDev, Min, Max, and Pixels count in a text report at ~/DICOM/exports/roi_statistics.txt using the following format:

ROI Type: Ellipse
Mean: <value>
StdDev: <value>
Min: <value>
Max: <value>
Pixels: <value>

Save a screenshot of the view showing the image and ROI overlay to ~/DICOM/exports/roi_annotated.jpg.
